title: Environment Variables
description: Configure your app for different environments using process.env.
reading_intro: Read environment variables through <0>process.env</0> as in any Node.js app. The site publisher wraps each lookup in a <1>requireEnv</1> helper that returns the value or throws a message pointing at <2>.env.example</2>.
heading_fail_fast: Failing fast on a missing key
fail_fast_intro: The page writer checks for <0>ANTHROPIC_API_KEY</0> at the top of its entry point and calls <1>process.exit(1)</1> with setup instructions when it is absent, so the run stops before any work begins rather than deep inside a handler.
secrets_intro: Pass secrets via environment variables or a secret manager:
warning_dotenv: CReact does not have built-in <0>.env</0> file loading. Use a package like <1>dotenv</1> or set variables in your shell / CI environment.
in_the_wild: See these env checks gate a real deployment in the <0>site-publisher walkthrough</0>.
